hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

Transfer learning from multimodal SEM data across different battery chemistries (e.g., LFP to NCM) will outperform single-chemistry transfer learning when fine-tuned on mixed additive conditions, because cross-chemistry pretraining forces the model to learn composition-invariant degradation features (particle cracking, boundary dissolution) that generalize better to novel additive-induced morphological changes than chemistry-specific features learned from NCM-only pretraining.
